examples: I can't overemphasize the cleanliness of this place.
Many of the state's beaches fail to meet minimum standards of cleanliness.
A number of Britain's beaches fail to meet European standards on cleanliness.
We also decided to rate the hawker stalls for cleanliness and food handling, from A to D.
This indicates an EatWith employee has personally approved the food quality, cleanliness and interpersonal skills of a host.
